title: Vanilla PvP Essentials
description: This texture pack, Vanilla PvP Essentials, will help you climb the ranks in the tierlist!
body:
A **CPvP TexturePack** to up your game in CPvP! Here’s what it changes:

* Low Fire
* Low Shield
* Small items (Food, XP bottles, etc.)
* Non-obstructive Particles + No particles in blocks
* Smaller totem particles
* Green glowstown dust

This pack is designed to enhance your performance in CPvP by providing **clearer visuals** and **better timing cues**. The low fire and shield make it easier to see your surroundings, while the small item sizes ensure you won’t be distracted by oversized icons. Non-obstructive particles keep your view clean. Download it now to gain a tactical advantage and excel in your CPvP gameplay!

**DISCLAIMER: I didn't make the smaller models on items (also called Smaller Util). Vanilla tweaks made them. Credits:**  
**Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/**
